use_cases: Toggle background music on landing pages or portfolio sites
Control ambient audio in interactive web experiences
Add playful audio feedback to button interactions
Enable sound on/off for media-heavy applications
Provide a simple music control for single-page applications
ai_summary: A minimalist music toggle button with animated waveform bars that respond to audio playback state. Features spring-based hover/tap animations using Framer Motion and integrates with use-sound for audio control. The component displays 5 animated bars that shift randomly when music plays and flatten when paused, providing visual feedback for the audio state. Click interaction toggles play/pause with smooth padding animations.
